name: QA 1696
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1696

Valgrind pmproxy REST API load testing.

**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py debian12-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:

Valgrind pmproxy REST API load testing.

To reproduce this test, please run:
